query:
CREATE TABLE training_enrollments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  employeeId INT NOT NULL,
  courseId VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  courseName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  enrollmentDate TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  status ENUM('not_started', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'failed') DEFAULT 'not_started',
  progress INT DEFAULT 0,
  isTransitionRequirement BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  transitionId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_employee (employeeId),
  INDEX idx_course (courseId),
  INDEX idx_transition (transitionId)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE training_enrollments (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  employeeId INT NOT NULL,
  courseId VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  courseName VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  enrollmentDate TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  status ENUM('not_started', 'in_progress', 'completed', 'failed') DEFAULT 'not_started',
  progress INT DEFAULT 0,
  isTransitionRequirement BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  transitionId INT DEFAULT NULL,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updatedAt TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX idx_employee (employeeId),
  INDEX idx_course (courseId),
  INDEX idx_transition (transitionId)
)
